word: H7192 - קְשִׂיטָה - qᵉsîyṭâh - kes-ee-taw' - Piece of money

sections.paragraph:
Original: קשׂיטה

Transliteration: qeśı̂yṭâh

Phonetic: kes-ee-taw'

BDB Definition:

  1. a unit of unknown value
    1. perhaps weight, money

Origin: from an unused root (probably meaning to weigh out)

TWOT entry: 2081a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
